Home Competitions Clubs Calendar Announcements About Us Contacts

Clubs

Student organizations and activities at both campuses.

Clubs and student organizations at Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School.

Middle School

Middle School

Student Council

Meets Wednesdays, 3:15 PM

Plan dances, spirit weeks, and community service projects. Elections held each fall.

Middle School

Art Club

Meets Thursdays, art room

Open studio time and group projects. No prior experience required.

Middle School

Coding Club

Meets Mondays, computer lab

Learn programming basics and work on fun projects with peer mentors.

High School

High School

National Honor Society

Induction each spring

Service, leadership, and scholarship. Members complete volunteer hours each semester.

High School

Drama Club

Fall play & spring musical

Auditions announced in class and on the announcements page. Crew roles always available.

High School

Environmental Club

Meets biweekly, Room 118

Campus recycling, garden projects, and local clean-up events.

© 2025 Frazer School PTA. All rights reserved.

Serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School. Maintained by parent volunteers.
